dragDropOrClick: Drag and drop a PDF here, or click to upload
uploadHint: Runs locally in your browser. No uploads.
extractionNotice: This tool extracts text already embedded in the PDF. Scanned pages or image-only documents need OCR, which is not part of this extractor.
resultsDescription: Review extraction coverage, copy the plain text, or download a TXT file.
noFileDescription: Upload a PDF to extract selectable text from its pages.
extractingDescription: Reading page text streams locally in your browser.
noTextDescription: The PDF opened successfully, but it did not expose selectable text. If the document is scanned, use OCR before extracting text.
scannedWarning: One or more pages contain image operations without selectable text. Those pages may need OCR.
parseError: Failed to extract text from the PDF.
passwordError: Password-protected PDFs are not supported by this extractor.
unsupportedFile: Unsupported file type. Please choose a PDF file.
